metadata.description: Azure Architecture Diagram Builder — LLM Cost Monitor workbook. Estimates Azure OpenAI / Foundry spend from the App Insights custom event 'AI_Model_Usage' (model, operation, promptTokens, completionTokens, totalTokens). Cost is ESTIMATED using an editable per-model $/1M-token table; actual billed cost is in Cost Management (see scripts/llm-cost-report.py).
Full resource ID of the Application Insights component receiving telemetry from the app.
Display name shown in the App Insights workbooks gallery.
Stable GUID so re-deploys update the same workbook instead of creating duplicates.

content.json:
## 💵 LLM Cost Monitor
Estimated Azure OpenAI / Foundry spend driven by the in-app telemetry event `AI_Model_Usage` (fires on every model call with token counts).

> ⚠️ **Estimated cost.** Token counts are real (from telemetry); dollar amounts are computed from an **editable per-model $/1M-token table** embedded in each query (seeded from the 30-day actuals on 2026-06-22). For **billed** cost use Azure Cost Management or run `scripts/llm-cost-report.py`, which joins Cost Management with this telemetry.

parameters.name: Model
parameters.label: Model
parameters.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'AI_Model_Usage'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| distinct model = tostring(customDimensions.model)
| order by model asc

parameters.name: Operation
parameters.label: Feature
parameters.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'AI_Model_Usage'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| distinct operation = tostring(customDimensions.operation)
| order by operation asc

content.query:
let P = datatable(model:string, usd1M:real)['GPT-5.1',30.01,'GPT-5.2',21.19,'GPT-5.2 Codex',9.28,'GPT-5.3 Codex',12.89,'GPT-5.4',12.76,'GPT-5.4 Mini',6.01,'DeepSeek V3.2 Speciale',1.33,'DeepSeek V4 Pro',2.87,'Grok 4.1 Fast',0.33,'Grok 4.3',0.90,'Mistral Large 3',0.97,'Kimi K2.5',2.31,'GPT-OSS 120B',0.45];
customEvents
| where name == 'AI_Model_Usage'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend model = tostring(customDimensions.model), operation = tostring(customDimensions.operation), totalTokens = toreal(customMeasurements.totalTokens)
| where model in ({Model})
| where operation in ({Operation})
| lookup kind=leftouter P on model
| extend usd1M = coalesce(usd1M, real(10.0))
| extend estCost = totalTokens / 1000000.0 * usd1M
| summarize ['Est. cost (USD)'] = round(sum(estCost), 2), ['Model calls'] = count(), ['Total tokens'] = tolong(sum(totalTokens)), ['Active users'] = dcount(user_Id), ['Avg $/call'] = round(sum(estCost) / count(), 4)
content.title: At a glance (estimated)

content.query:
let P = datatable(model:string, usd1M:real)['GPT-5.1',30.01,'GPT-5.2',21.19,'GPT-5.2 Codex',9.28,'GPT-5.3 Codex',12.89,'GPT-5.4',12.76,'GPT-5.4 Mini',6.01,'DeepSeek V3.2 Speciale',1.33,'DeepSeek V4 Pro',2.87,'Grok 4.1 Fast',0.33,'Grok 4.3',0.90,'Mistral Large 3',0.97,'Kimi K2.5',2.31,'GPT-OSS 120B',0.45];
customEvents
| where name == 'AI_Model_Usage'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend model = tostring(customDimensions.model), operation = tostring(customDimensions.operation), totalTokens = toreal(customMeasurements.totalTokens)
| where model in ({Model})
| where operation in ({Operation})
| lookup kind=leftouter P on model
| extend usd1M = coalesce(usd1M, real(10.0))
| extend estCost = totalTokens / 1000000.0 * usd1M
| summarize ['Est. cost (USD)'] = round(sum(estCost), 2) by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Estimated cost over time (daily)

content.query:
let P = datatable(model:string, usd1M:real)['GPT-5.1',30.01,'GPT-5.2',21.19,'GPT-5.2 Codex',9.28,'GPT-5.3 Codex',12.89,'GPT-5.4',12.76,'GPT-5.4 Mini',6.01,'DeepSeek V3.2 Speciale',1.33,'DeepSeek V4 Pro',2.87,'Grok 4.1 Fast',0.33,'Grok 4.3',0.90,'Mistral Large 3',0.97,'Kimi K2.5',2.31,'GPT-OSS 120B',0.45];
customEvents
| where name == 'AI_Model_Usage'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend model = tostring(customDimensions.model), operation = tostring(customDimensions.operation), totalTokens = toreal(customMeasurements.totalTokens)
| where model in ({Model})
| where operation in ({Operation})
| lookup kind=leftouter P on model
| extend usd1M = coalesce(usd1M, real(10.0))
| extend estCost = totalTokens / 1000000.0 * usd1M
| summarize Calls = count(), Users = dcount(user_Id), Tokens = tolong(sum(totalTokens)), ['Est. cost (USD)'] = round(sum(estCost), 2) by Model = model
| extend ['$/call'] = round(todouble(['Est. cost (USD)']) / Calls, 4)
| order by ['Est. cost (USD)'] desc
content.title: Cost & usage by model

content.query:
let P = datatable(model:string, usd1M:real)['GPT-5.1',30.01,'GPT-5.2',21.19,'GPT-5.2 Codex',9.28,'GPT-5.3 Codex',12.89,'GPT-5.4',12.76,'GPT-5.4 Mini',6.01,'DeepSeek V3.2 Speciale',1.33,'DeepSeek V4 Pro',2.87,'Grok 4.1 Fast',0.33,'Grok 4.3',0.90,'Mistral Large 3',0.97,'Kimi K2.5',2.31,'GPT-OSS 120B',0.45];
customEvents
| where name == 'AI_Model_Usage'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend model = tostring(customDimensions.model), operation = tostring(customDimensions.operation), totalTokens = toreal(customMeasurements.totalTokens)
| where model in ({Model})
| where operation in ({Operation})
| lookup kind=leftouter P on model
| extend usd1M = coalesce(usd1M, real(10.0))
| extend estCost = totalTokens / 1000000.0 * usd1M
| summarize ['Est. cost (USD)'] = round(sum(estCost), 2) by Model = model
| order by ['Est. cost (USD)'] desc
content.title: Share of estimated cost by model

content.query:
let P = datatable(model:string, usd1M:real)['GPT-5.1',30.01,'GPT-5.2',21.19,'GPT-5.2 Codex',9.28,'GPT-5.3 Codex',12.89,'GPT-5.4',12.76,'GPT-5.4 Mini',6.01,'DeepSeek V3.2 Speciale',1.33,'DeepSeek V4 Pro',2.87,'Grok 4.1 Fast',0.33,'Grok 4.3',0.90,'Mistral Large 3',0.97,'Kimi K2.5',2.31,'GPT-OSS 120B',0.45];
customEvents
| where name == 'AI_Model_Usage'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend model = tostring(customDimensions.model), operation = tostring(customDimensions.operation), totalTokens = toreal(customMeasurements.totalTokens)
| where model in ({Model})
| where operation in ({Operation})
| lookup kind=leftouter P on model
| extend usd1M = coalesce(usd1M, real(10.0))
| extend estCost = totalTokens / 1000000.0 * usd1M
| summarize ['Est. cost (USD)'] = round(sum(estCost), 2), Calls = count() by Feature = operation
| order by ['Est. cost (USD)'] desc
content.title: Estimated cost by feature

content.query:
let P = datatable(model:string, usd1M:real)['GPT-5.1',30.01,'GPT-5.2',21.19,'GPT-5.2 Codex',9.28,'GPT-5.3 Codex',12.89,'GPT-5.4',12.76,'GPT-5.4 Mini',6.01,'DeepSeek V3.2 Speciale',1.33,'DeepSeek V4 Pro',2.87,'Grok 4.1 Fast',0.33,'Grok 4.3',0.90,'Mistral Large 3',0.97,'Kimi K2.5',2.31,'GPT-OSS 120B',0.45];
customEvents
| where name == 'AI_Model_Usage'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend model = tostring(customDimensions.model), operation = tostring(customDimensions.operation), totalTokens = toreal(customMeasurements.totalTokens)
| where model in ({Model})
| where operation in ({Operation})
| lookup kind=leftouter P on model
| extend usd1M = coalesce(usd1M, real(10.0))
| extend estCost = totalTokens / 1000000.0 * usd1M
| summarize ['Est. cost (USD)'] = round(sum(estCost), 2), Calls = count(), Tokens = tolong(sum(totalTokens)), (LastSeen, IP, Country, City) = arg_max(timestamp, client_IP, client_CountryOrRegion, client_City) by User = user_Id
| project User, ['Est. cost (USD)'], Calls, Tokens, IP, Country, City, ['Last seen'] = LastSeen
| order by ['Est. cost (USD)'] desc
| take 25
content.title: Top users by estimated cost

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'AI_Model_Usage'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend model = tostring(customDimensions.model), operation = tostring(customDimensions.operation), promptTokens = toreal(customMeasurements.promptTokens), completionTokens = toreal(customMeasurements.completionTokens)
| where model in ({Model})
| where operation in ({Operation})
| summarize ['Input tokens'] = tolong(sum(promptTokens)), ['Output tokens'] = tolong(sum(completionTokens)) by Model = model
| order by ['Output tokens'] desc
content.title: Input vs output tokens by model

content.json:
### 🧮 How cost is estimated
Each query multiplies the **real** `totalTokens` from telemetry by a **per-model blended `$/1M`-token rate** (the `let P = datatable(...)` at the top of every query). Models with no rate fall back to `$10/1M`.

**To update rates:** edit the `P` datatable in each query (or regenerate seeds with `scripts/llm-cost-report.py`, which derives blended `$/1M` per model from Cost Management). Blended rates fold input/output/cached mix into one number, so they drift if a model's usage pattern changes — refresh periodically.

**For billed (actual) cost:** use Azure Cost Management → Cost analysis on the Foundry resource group, or run `scripts/llm-cost-report.py --days 30`.
